privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, publicly available sample music store database from https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database. All metadata claims about table names (Track, Album, Artist, Genre, Invoice, Customer), parameter names (:track_name, :start_date, :end_date), and query keywords (LIKE, ORDER BY, DESC) are verified and correct. The target ODB file location is /home/ga/chinook.odb. All required tables and columns exist with correct definitions. Foreign key relationships between tables are properly defined. The database contains substantial real data: 3503 tracks, 412 invoices, and related customer/artist/album/genre records.
